name: HeroBannerHeaderBlockPlacement
description:
Available HeroBanner header text block placement options.

Defines the vertical placement of the header text block within the banner header area.

values.name: Bottom
values.description: Places the header text block at the bottom of the header area.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Places the header text block at the bottom of the header area.
 * 
 * @private
 */

values.name: Top
values.description: Places the header text block at the top of the header area.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Places the header text block at the top of the header area.
 * 
 * @private
 */

_jsDoc:
/**
 * Available HeroBanner header text block placement options.
